stemHtml: Which statement about V<sub>R</sub> is correct?

options.a: In the event of an engine failure below V<sub>R</sub>, the take-off should be aborted.
options.b: V<sub>R</sub> is the lowest climb speed after an engine failure.
options.c: V<sub>R</sub> is the speed at which rotation should be initiated.
options.d: V<sub>R</sub> is the lowest speed for directional control in the event of an engine failure.
